body:
### Your current environment
The output of python collect_env.py ```text Your output of `python collect_env.py` here ```
### Your code version
The commit id or version of vllm ```text ```
The commit id or version of vllm-omni ```text 0.20.0 ```
### 🐛 Describe the bug 运行命令如下： ```bash export ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 model_base="/data/Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-Diffusers" python text_to_video.py \ --prompt "Two anthropomorphic cats in comfy boxing gear and bright gloves fight intensely on a spotlighted stage." \ --negative-prompt "" \ --height 480 \ --width 832 \ --num-frames 33 \ --guidance-scale 4.0 \ --guidance-scale-high 3.0 \ --flow-shift 12.0 \ --num-inference-steps 40 \ --fps 16 \ --output t2v_out.mp4 \ --cache-backend "cache_dit" \ --model ${model_base} \ --ulysses-degree 2 \ --cfg-parallel-size 2 \ --enable-cpu-offload ``` 报错如下： ```bash WARNING 07-01 02:48:30 [pipeline_wan2_2.py:553] boundary_ratio is required for T2V generation. using default value 0.875 WARNING 07-01 02:48:30 [pipeline_wan2_2.py:553] boundary_ratio is required for T2V generation. using default value 0.875 WARNING 07-01 02:48:30 [pipeline_wan2_2.py:553] boundary_ratio is required for T2V generation. using default value 0.875 WARNING 07-01 02:48:30 [pipeline_wan2_2.py:553] boundary_ratio is required for T2V generation. using default value 0.875 0%| | 0/1 [00:00

comments.author: FayeSpica
comments.body:
Verified OK on commit 724f5d132deb55dfd73591c83494eca15c95d179 , details below. Might be worth trying the newer version(>=0.23.0) too.

Check version match: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/issues/2223#issuecomment-4705062827

## Try
```shell
docker run --name omni \
    --privileged \
    --shm-size=64g \
    --entrypoint /bin/bash \
    --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway \
    --device /dev/davinci0 \
    --device /dev/davinci1 \
    --device /dev/davinci2 \
    --device /dev/davinci3 \
    --device /dev/davinci4 \
    --device /dev/davinci5 \
    --device /dev/davinci6 \
    --device /dev/davinci7 \
    --device /dev/davinci_manager \
    --device /dev/devmm_svm \
    --device /dev/hisi_hdc \
    -v /usr/local/dcmi:/usr/local/dcmi \
    -v /usr/local/bin/npu-smi:/usr/local/bin/npu-smi \
    -v /usr/local/Ascend/driver/lib64/:/usr/local/Ascend/driver/lib64/ \
    -v /usr/local/Ascend/driver/version.info:/usr/local/Ascend/driver/version.info \
    -v /root/.cache/:/root/.cache/ \
    -it quay.nju.edu.cn/ascend/vllm-omni:v0.23.0rc1
```

## Results

```shell
root@52c4fc62430c:/vllm-workspace/vllm-omni# python examples/offline_inference/text_to_video/text_to_video.py \
  --prompt "Two anthropomorphic cats in comfy boxing gear and bright gloves fight intensely on a spotlighted stage." \
  --negative-prompt "<optional quality filter>" \
  --height 480 \
  --width 832 \
  --num-frames 33 \
  --guidance-scale 4.0 \
  --guidance-scale-high 3.0 \
  --flow-shift 12.0 \
  --num-inference-steps 40 \
  --fps 16 \
  --output t2v_out.mp4 \
  --cache-backend "cache_dit" \
  --model Wan-AI/Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-Diffusers \
  --ulysses-degree 2 \
  --cfg-parallel-size 2 \
  --enable-cpu-offload
INFO 07-01 12:39:20 [__init__.py:44] Available plugins for group vllm.platform_p

comments.author: Gaohan123
comments.body: Please try the version in the comment. I can reopen if needed.

title: [Bug]: Wan2.2 不支持同时开启ulysses并行和cache-dit [ASCEND NPU]
